overview: A premium original university website inspired by modern Korean academic aesthetics. Features a full-screen hero slider, mega-menu navigation, news, research highlights, admissions, campus life, global programs, events, and six subpages — all in an elegant dark navy and white theme.
features: Fixed transparent header with mega-menu navigation
Full-screen hero slider with auto-play and fade transitions
10 homepage sections: news, announcements, research, admissions, campus life, global programs, events, quick links, footer
6 subpages: About, Admissions, Academics, Research, Campus Life, International
Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile
Scroll-reveal animations and smooth hover effects
Dark navy and white premium academic theme
